title: Huawei S210-24T2J Gbit Cloud Switch
description: Huawei S210-24T2J is a reliable managed cloud L2 switch with a switching capacity of 58Gbps , (24) Gbit ports and (2) 2.5G SFP slots . It supports management via a local web interface as well as cloud management ( eKit SNC / eKit mobile app ). The maximum power consumption is 18.9W (24) Gbit ports and (2) 2.5G SFP slots Passive cooling - silent operation, suitable for office environments Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) - automatic one-click updates Forwarding First - preferential traffic forwarding on ports 1-8 during uplink congestion Protection against DoS attacks and other security features Automatic loop prevention, VLAN, QoS and uplink port link aggregation Device Power cable Grounding cable Rack mounts Rubber feet
